description: Zod schema changes id field from string to UUID type
diff_summary: Added .uuid() validator to UserSchema id field

edge_cases: Any test fixtures using simple string IDs like 'user-1' or 'test-id' now fail Zod parsing — all tests using non-UUID id strings break
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Tightening validation on an existing schema is a breaking change if existing data uses non-UUID IDs (legacy integer IDs, slug IDs); should verify all data conforms before adding validator
ground_truth.next_prompt: All tests are failing with ZodError: Invalid uuid
ground_truth.notes: Adding format validation to existing data requires checking existing data conforms first
